frontmatter.title: Normalization for multimodal type theory
frontmatter.meta: @inproceedings{gratzer:2022, title = {Normalization for Multimodal Type Theory}, author = {Gratzer, Daniel}, address = {New York, NY, USA}, publisher = {Association for Computing Machinery}, booktitle = {Proceedings of the 37th Annual ACM/IEEE Symposium on Logic in Computer Science}, year = {2022}, doi = {10.1145/3531130.3532398}, url = {https://jozefg.github.io/papers/2022-normalization-for-multimodal-type-theory-short.pdf}, }
Symposium on Logic and Computer Science (LICS)
